mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_mail WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM oa_mail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder = 'inbox' AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM oa_mail WHERE sender_id = #{userId} AND folder = 'sent' AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM oa_mail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder = 'draft' AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_mail WHERE folder = 'inbox' AND is_read = 0 AND del_flag = 0
